title: Figure 5 from: Ainsworth A, Cannon P, Dentinger B (2013) DNA barcoding and morphological studies reveal two new species of waxcap mushrooms (Hygrophoraceae) in Britain. MycoKeys 7: 45-62. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.7.5860
author: Ainsworth, Antony

description: Figure 5 - Microscopic characters of Gliophorus europerplexus, A mounted in Melzer's Reagent and B–D(holotype) in Congo Red, scale bars represent 10 µm. A Spores from lamellar squash K(M)181241*B Subregular lamellar trama from squash mount K(M)181246*C–D Basidia K(M)181246*.
